# GrowMore Agri Science - Full Documentation

> Complete catalog, company profile, and partnership documentation for GrowMore Agri Science. Formulated for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents.

---

## 1. Company Profile

GrowMore Agri Science is a leading manufacturer of premium agricultural fertilizers, bio-stimulants, and crop protection products specifically formulated for Indian soil and crops since 2015. 

### Mission & Core Values
- **Farmer First**: Designing affordable, high-impact solutions to double farmers' yield and income.
- **Quality Assurance**: Every single batch of products undergoes stringent laboratory testing for purity and concentration.
- **Innovation**: Continuous research into organic formulas, bio-simulants, and advanced soil health conditioners.

### Performance Statistics
- **Years of Experience**: 10+ years
- **Products Manufactured**: 20+ premium formulations
- **Farmer Footprint**: 10,000+ happy farmers across India
- **Dealer Network**: 200+ authorized distributors

### Leadership
- **Yatin Patel** (Indore/Betma): Managing Director (Strategic Vision)
- **Ravi Patel** (Indore/Betma): Director of Operations (Supply Chain & Support)

---

## 2. Product Catalog & Details

GrowMore manufactures across five main categories. Below are the details of each product.

### 2.1 Plant Growth Promoters & Fertilizers

#### Grow Fast
- **Description**: Highly efficient vegetative growth accelerator designed to increase crop canopy, branching, and overall vigour.
- **Application**: Recommended for all commercial crops, vegetables, and fruit orchards.
- **Hindi Translation (ग्रो फास्ट)**: सभी फसलों में वानस्पतिक विकास को गति देता है।

#### Ultima / UltiMAX
- **Description**: Dual-action plant growth promoters and bio-stimulants that enhance flowering, reduce stress, and improve defense mechanisms.
- **Hindi Translation (अल्टिमा / अल्टी-मैक्स)**: दोहरी कार्रवाई वाला प्लांट ग्रोथ प्रमोटर और रक्षक।

#### Humi Zone Humic Acid (Liquid)
- **Description**: Premium soil conditioner containing concentrated humic and fulvic acids. Improves soil aeration, structure, water retention, and microbial activity.
- **Hindi Translation (ह्यूमी ज़ोन ह्यूमिक एसिड लिक्विड)**: मिट्टी की कंडीशनिंग के लिए प्रीमियम लिक्विड ह्यूमिक एसिड।

#### Humi Zone Red Humic Acid (Powder)
- **Description**: 100% water-soluble powder formulation that accelerates root development and increases fertilizer uptake efficiency.
- **Hindi Translation (ह्यूमी ज़ोन रेड ह्यूमिक एसिड पाउडर)**: जड़ों के बेहतर विकास के लिए 100% पानी में घुलनशील पाउडर।

#### Humi Zone Plus Humic Acid (Powder)
- **Description**: Advanced premium grade humic acid powder fortified with trace elements for maximum nutrient uptake.
- **Hindi Translation (ह्यूमी ज़ोन प्लस ह्यूमिक एसिड पाउडर)**: अधिकतम पोषक तत्वों के अवशोषण के लिए उन्नत फार्मूला।

---

### 2.2 Flowering Stimulants

#### G Flower
- **Description**: Specialized formulation that prevents flower and fruit drop, increases fruit setting, and optimizes flower quality and count.
- **Hindi Translation (जी फ्लावर फ्लावरिंग स्टिमुलेंट)**: प्रचुर मात्रा में फूल और बेहतर उपज सुनिश्चित करता है।

---

### 2.3 Soil Conditioners & Organic Fertilizers

#### Grow Star Granules
- **Description**: Granular soil application enriched with essential micro-nutrients, humic acid, and soil-bonding elements.
- **Hindi Translation (ग्रो स्टार ग्रेन्यूल्स सॉइल कंडीशनर)**: मिट्टी को आवश्यक सूक्ष्म पोषक तत्वों से समृद्ध करता है।

#### ZenStar
- **Description**: Premium organic soil conditioner granules designed to maintain soil pH, increase organic carbon content, and improve root health.
- **Hindi Translation (ZenStar)**: Zenstar एक प्रीमियम उत्पाद है जो मृदा स्वास्थ्य में सुधार करता है।

#### Unizyme Plant Hormones
- **Description**: Enzyme-based plant health product that contains seaweed extracts, amino acids, and vital hormones for robust physiological growth.
- **Hindi Translation (यूनीज़िम प्लांट हार्मोन्स)**: मजबूत पौधों के स्वास्थ्य के लिए कृषि उर्वरक।

---

### 2.4 Bio Crop Protectants (Organic Pesticides)

#### Killer Bio Crop Protector
- **Description**: Broad-spectrum organic crop protectant that offers resistance against sucking pests, caterpillars, and fungal infestations. Safe for non-target organisms.
- **Hindi Translation (किलर बायो क्रॉप प्रोटेक्टेंट कीटनाशक)**: कीट प्रबंधन के लिए जैविक समाधान।

#### Super Killer
- **Description**: Powerful organic formulation offering immediate control against crop pests while encouraging parallel recovery growth.
- **Hindi Translation (सुपर किलर)**: कीटों और बीमारियों के खिलाफ तीव्र प्रतिक्रिया और फसल सुरक्षा।

#### Bio-3G Combo Special
- **Description**: Complex combination of bio-promoters and protectants designed to address multiple crop issues simultaneously.
- **Hindi Translation (Bio 3G Combo Special)**: पौध विकास प्रमोटर और बायो-प्रोटेक्टेंट की जटिल क्रिया।

---

### 2.5 Silicone Spreaders

#### Grow Wet
- **Description**: Super-spreading, silicon-based surfactant. Dramatically reduces surface tension of spray solutions, ensuring complete coverage, rain-fastness, and deep penetration of fertilizers or protectants.
- **Hindi Translation (ग्रो वेट सिलिकॉन वेटिंग एजेंट)**: बेहतर फैलाव और गीला करने वाला एजेंट।

---

## 3. Distributor Network & Opportunities

GrowMore Agri Science supports a robust network of over 200 distributors across India. 

### Distributor Benefits
- High-profit margins on premium formulations.
- On-ground sales support and promotional/marketing materials.
- Direct-to-factory logistics support.
- Exclusive territorial rights.

### Existing Hubs (Madhya Pradesh)

2. **Kisan Seva Kendra**: Bhopal Naka, Sehore, MP 466001 (Phone: +91 97XXX XXXXX)
3. **Green Earth Distributors**: Dewas Road, Ujjain, MP 456010 (Phone: +91 96XXX XXXXX)

---

## 5. Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

### What is GrowMore Agri Science?
GrowMore Agri Science is a premium agricultural solutions manufacturer specializing in humic acids, bio-safe crop protectors, and plant growth promoters, headquartered in Madhya Pradesh, India.

### Are the products suitable for organic farming?
Yes, many formulations including the "Killer Bio Crop Protector" and organic stimulants are bio-safe, eco-friendly, and optimized for sustainable farming.

### How do I apply for a dealership?
You can apply via the form on the [Distributors Page](https://growmoreagriscience.com/grow-more/en/distributor) or contact sales directly via WhatsApp on +917247077028.
